rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports within the component type scope.
Place implementation-level bindings (assignments) within the implementation scope.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations when defining input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in dependency guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Ensure AGREE expressions align with AADL data types (bool, int, real).
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Avoid encoding AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly into AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as ports or constants.
